case_for: The high pregame projection (28.6) reflects strong expected target share and recent big-game upside (19.3 and 28.6 pt performances) suggesting he can easily clear a modest 12-point bar.
case_against: His last six games show extreme inconsistency with four out of six below the 12-point threshold, including multiple single-digit duds (0.8, 4.9, 5.1 pts).
